assertions.description: Output reports total_components=46, unique_parts=24. Component breakdown: resistor=8, connector=16, mounting_hole=4, ic=4, switch=1, capacitor=9, led=1, diode=1, transistor=2. Power rails +3.3V, GND, PWR_FLAG all detected. LDO regulator U1 (TLV1117-50) detected with input_rail=MOTOR_PWR, output_rail derived correctly. DRV8833 drivers appear as part of motor control path. RC filter detected: R18 (10k) + C14 (0.1uF) as 159.15 Hz low-pass on RESET net — this is the Pico reset debounce/filter, correctly identified.
